rich.title: [杭州/远程] MAGICKBASE诚聘 产品经理、全栈工程师、ruby工程师
rich.author: fangqiao1
rich.summary:
### **团队介绍**
Brand:
Magickbase => Magi(decision-making system), CKB(Common Knowledge Base), Base
responsibilities: JavaScript Engineer(Full time, 40h/week)
Responsibilities
Build high-quality web applications and electron-based desktop applications;
Keep optimizing code and applications in codebase, performance and user interface;
Build dev-tools/libs for the whole ecosystem of nervos network CKB project and godwoken project;
Minimum Qualifications
Comp. Sci or Comp. Eng degree or demonstrable skill and equivalent experience;
Have worked on generic front-end scope such as Node.js app, electron app;
Proficient in utilities of front-end, such as scaffold, css pretreats, and template engines;
Prefer React and TypeScript;
Have knowledge of Blockchain and have participated in related products design;
Fluently in English reading and writing.
Preferred Qualifications
Live in open source community;
Have GitHub or Blog
Product/Project Manager(Full time, 40h/week)
Build and manage robust, scalable and delightful products that are aligned with the company's mission;
Clearly define product goals, value propositions, milestones and success metrics. Document requirements and acceptance criteria to ship the right product;

Use good product thinking and judgment to manage product development and lifecycle, coordinating teams and resources to follow through from conception, development, testing, release management, and promotion;
Own and track product success metrics and manage product feedback loops to drive improvements.
3+ years of experience working as a product manager in the software development or internet industry;
Strong understanding of product and design thinking methodologies;
Proven experience in developing product and marketing strategies and effectively communicating recommendations to executive management;
Strong problem solving skills and a high level of account
Ruby Engineer(Full time, 40h/week)
Understanding business requirements and being responsible for product design and development;
Being responsible for the performance optimization of existing products;
Maintaining blockchain related tools;
Collaborate with Ops to deploy and maintain projects.
3+ years of practical experience working with Ruby, Ruby on Rails;
A proven track record of open source projects or open source community contributions;
Junior Tester(Full time, 40h/week)
Particiate in product and technical design to bring better products to nervos community;
Test the full application stack using a range of testing approcches from automation to exploratory;
Respond to, and support, issues from community;
Constantly learn and expand knownledge about blockchain and nervos CKB.
Drive to support continuous improvement in testing practices;
Have knownledge on Blockchain and have particiated in related products;
Fluently in English.
requirements: Comp. Sci or Comp. Eng degree or demonstrable skill and equivalent experience; Experienced in Front-end development, familiar with HTML, CSS and TypeScript; Have worked on Node.js app and electron app; Prefer React and TypeScript; Have knowledge of Blockchain; 3+ years of experience as a product manager in software development or internet industry; 3+ years of practical experience with Ruby/Ruby on Rails; Experience with MySQL/PostgreSQL, Git/GitHub, RESTful standards, redis caching/messaging systems; Experienced with system testing, integration testing, and test automation; Fluently in English reading and writing.
compensation_notes: 远程办公:无论你在哪里,我们都可以并肩奋斗!
弹性工作:无论你是早睡早起的好孩子还是不怕黑眼圈的夜猫子，我们都可以并肩奋斗！
商业保险:除五险一金外,额外购买商业保险为你提供更多保障！
成长机会:我们关注你的个人成长，线上学习平台线下活动交流都在碗里！

sections.title: 团队介绍
paragraphs: Brand:
Magickbase => Magi(decision-making system), CKB(Common Knowledge Base), Base
Products:
Neuron, a full-node desktop ckb wallet
CKB Explorer, ckb explorer for the layer1
GwScan, godwoken explorer for the layer2
Axon Explorer, axon explorer for the layer2
Vision:
Analyzing data from three platforms in the system for decision making and providing a controller for users to drive their assets.
招聘地址： https://github.com/Magickbase/open-positions

sections.title: 薪资福利待遇
paragraphs: 远程办公:无论你在哪里,我们都可以并肩奋斗!
弹性工作:无论你是早睡早起的好孩子还是不怕黑眼圈的夜猫子，我们都可以并肩奋斗！
商业保险:除五险一金外,额外购买商业保险为你提供更多保障！
成长机会:我们关注你的个人成长，线上学习平台线下活动交流都在碗里！

sections.title: 地点
bullets: 工作地点：远程分布式办公

sections.title: 工作性质
paragraphs: ## 岗位要求、职责
**JavaScript Engineer(Full time, 40h/week)**

sections.title: Responsibilities
paragraphs: Build high-quality web applications and electron-based desktop applications;
Keep optimizing code and applications in codebase, performance and user interface;
Build dev-tools/libs for the whole ecosystem of nervos network CKB project and godwoken project;
**Minimum Qualifications**
Comp. Sci or Comp. Eng degree or demonstrable skill and equivalent experience;
Experienced in Front-end development, familiar with HTML, CSS and TypeScript, have a clear understanding of Web standards(Accessibility, Security);
Have worked on generic front-end scope such as Node.js app, electron app;
Proficient in utilities of front-end, such as scaffold, css pretreats, and template engines;
Prefer React and TypeScript;
Have knowledge of Blockchain and have participated in related products design;
Fluently in English reading and writing.
**Preferred Qualifications**
Live in open source community;
Have GitHub or Blog
**Product/Project Manager(Full time, 40h/week)**

sections.title: Responsibilities
paragraphs: Build and manage robust, scalable and delightful products that are aligned with the company's mission;
Clearly define product goals, value propositions, milestones and success metrics. Document requirements and acceptance criteria to ship the right product;

Use good product thinking and judgment to manage product development and lifecycle, coordinating teams and resources to follow through from conception, development, testing, release management, and promotion;
Own and track product success metrics and manage product feedback loops to drive improvements.
**Minimum Qualifications**
3+ years of experience working as a product manager in the software development or internet industry;
Strong understanding of product and design thinking methodologies;
Experience managing all aspects of a successful product throughout its lifecycle;
Proven experience in developing product and marketing strategies and effectively communicating recommendations to executive management;
Strong problem solving skills and a high level of account
**Ruby Engineer(Full time, 40h/week)**

sections.title: Responsibilities
paragraphs: Understanding business requirements and being responsible for product design and development;
Being responsible for the performance optimization of existing products;
Maintaining blockchain related tools;
Collaborate with Ops to deploy and maintain projects.
**Minimum Qualifications**
Comp. Sci or Comp. Eng degree or demonstrable skill and equivalent experience;
3+ years of practical experience working with Ruby, Ruby on Rails;
Experience with daily database design and development as well as optimization (MySQL, PostgreSQL);
Familiarity with Git/GitHub and RESTful standards;
Familiarity with underlying middleware, distributed technologies (including redis caching, messaging systems, etc.);
Fluently in English reading and writing.
**Preferred Qualifications**
A proven track record of open source projects or open source community contributions;
Experience with database tuning;
Experience with system performance optimization;
Experience with blockchain product development;
Experience with full-stack development;
**Junior Tester(Full time, 40h/week)**

sections.title: Responsibilities
paragraphs: Particiate in product and technical design to bring better products to nervos community;
Test the full application stack using a range of testing approcches from automation to exploratory;
Respond to, and support, issues from community;
Constantly learn and expand knownledge about blockchain and nervos CKB.
**Minimum Qualifications**
Drive to support continuous improvement in testing practices;
Experienced with system testing, integration testing;
Experienced building or executing test automation across layers of the software stack;
Have knownledge on Blockchain and have particiated in related products;
Fluently in English.
**Preferred Qualifications**
Live in open source community;
Have GitHub or Blog

narrative: ### **团队介绍** Brand: Magickbase => Magi(decision-making system), CKB(Common Knowledge Base), Base

Products: Neuron, a full-node desktop ckb wallet CKB Explorer, ckb explorer for the layer1 GwScan, godwoken explorer for the layer2 Axon Explorer, axon explorer for the layer2 Vision: Analyzing data from three platforms in the system for decision making and providing a controller for users to drive their assets.
## 薪资福利待遇 远程办公:无论你在哪里,我们都可以并肩奋斗! 弹性工作:无论你是早睡早起的好孩子还是不怕黑眼圈的夜猫子，我们都可以并肩奋斗！ 商业保险:除五险一金外,额外购买商业保险为你提供更多保障！ 成长机会:我们关注你的个人成长，线上学习平台线下活动交流都在碗里！ ## 地点
- 工作地点：远程分布式办公 - 联系方式：Mail us jobs@magickbase.com ## 工作性质
- 是否全职：是 - 是否远程：是
